qa_pairs.question: What is LibreQDA?
qa_pairs.answer: LibreQDA is an application for qualitative analysis, forked from Taguette.

qa_pairs.question: What kind of analysis can LibreQDA be used for?
qa_pairs.answer: It can be used for text analysis, specifically as a single-user version of the software.

qa_pairs.question: How long does a new LibreQDA session typically take to start up?
qa_pairs.answer: For a new session, the LibreQDA session can take up to 3 minutes to complete its startup.

qa_pairs.question: When does a LibreQDA session conclude?
qa_pairs.answer: The LibreQDA session will end when the JupyterLab session ends.

qa_pairs.question: From which software was LibreQDA forked?
